steps.name: phase1_validation
steps.acceptance: Single-molecule ethanol (T=9, no padding) achieves VF >= 90% with per_dim_scale=True

result.outcome: FAILED — best VF 39.2% (8 blocks, ldr=0, step 500), target 90%
result.re_diagnosis: per_dim_scale has <1pp effect (und_001 Phase 4). True root cause: post-norm vs pre-norm, layers_per_block=1 vs 2.

steps.name: phase2_padding
steps.reason: Phase 1 failed — T=9 single-molecule VF only 39.2%, far below 90% gate. Phase 2 requires Phase 1 passage.
